title: ReleaseProvenanceV1
description: Governed release provenance binding: commit lineage → validation evidence → artifact hash → immutable release tag.

release_id.description: Unique identifier for this release provenance record.

release_tag.description: Immutable git tag name for the release (e.g. v1.2.3). Unique across all releases.

commit_sha.description: Full git commit SHA that this release binds to. Must match proof commit lineage.

workflow_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical release workflow content. Ensures no stale workflow releases.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 of the release artifact. Deterministic and immutable after registration.

validation_proof_id.description: proof_id from proof_registry that authorized this release. Must reference PROVEN proof.

proof_references.description: Ordered list of proof_id values forming the complete validation lineage.

release_lineage_hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 over (release_tag, commit_sha, workflow_hash, artifact_hash, validation_proof_id, decision_id). Unique constraint enforces no duplicate lineage paths.

decision_id.description: Governed decision that authorized this release.

invocation_nonce.description: Single-use nonce for replay protection. Rejected if already consumed.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Only RELEASED status produces canonical release artifacts.

evidence_only.description: This registry is authoritative, not evidence-only.
